personality_traits: uncertain when social rules don't apply
speaking_style: Polished but occasionally reveals a gap — never quite knows how to talk to common people.
backstory_seeds: slumming it incognito, which is going about as well as expected
fleeing an arranged marriage, debt, or family embarrassment
genuinely interested in ordinary people in a clumsy, patronizing way
waiting for a message from the capital that will determine their fate
the estate is smaller than it used to be and the pestilence took the tenants who made it profitable
has a younger brother whose claim to the inheritance is technically stronger and who knows it
owes a significant sum to a moneylender and is deciding which creditor to approach for a loan to cover it
came down to see how the common people live and is finding the experience more interesting than expected
